examples: If making money is your daydream and losing money your nightmare, if poverty is your worst fear and making money your most fervent prayer, you have missed the opportunity for education.
"No, I am a fervent animal lover," replied Ruth.
She's found some new favorites and one fervent dislike.
Yet every year, the small Australian country town still pays fervent homage to his music and enduring style.
In Silicon Valley, paranoia around maintaining fervent control is even higher than other industries.
